events_list.title: Welch Crystallization Symposium 2026
events_list.preview:
We are pleased to announce that the annual Welch Crystallization Symposium will take place on October 9, 2026. 

Hosted by the Welch Center for Advanced Bioactive Materials Crystallization, this event serves as a premier forum for researchers, faculty, and industry professionals. Attendees will explore the latest advancements in crystal nucleation, molecular engineering, and nonclassical crystallization pathways.

Key Information:
Date: Friday, October 9, 2026
Host: Welch Center for Advanced Bioactive Materials Crystallization
Audience: Materials scientists, chemical engineers, chemists, and industry experts

Stay tuned for upcoming announcements regarding our keynote speaker lineup, session topics, and registration details.
